title: Runtime phase B GC opt-in

source.subject: runtime: phase B GC opt-in (multi-mutator, pointer channels, syscall-pool guard)

body:
Runtime enables Phase B GC opt-in: multi-mutator collection, pointer channels, and syscall-pool guard integration.

- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope

- **Workstream:** `concurrency-runtime`
- **Domain:** `execution`

## Relation
